author: ShadyTidus
description: Schedule announcements to channels with timezone-aware scheduling, preview/edit workflow, and role-based permissions.
install_msg:
ShadyAnnounce cog installed. Use `/mytime` to set your timezone, then `/announce` to schedule posts.

Features:
- Personal timezone settings
- Preview before scheduling
- Edit/cancel workflow
- Role-based permissions
name: ShadyAnnounce
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user timezone preferences, scheduled announcement content, and posting history.
